explainers: 1 Tier-1 competitor move in priority markets
headline: Sage + CPA.com integrate AICPA content into Sage Copilot; Avalara opens 1099/W-9 APIs; Xero ships UK AI data capture ahead of MTD.
why_it_moved: Score moved because: 1 Tier-1 competitor move in priority markets

competitors.headline: Sage partners with CPA.com to embed authoritative AICPA content in Sage Copilot
competitors.summary: Sage Group plc announced a partnership with CPA.com to integrate authoritative AICPA content into Sage Copilot, its AI accounting assistant — sharpens Sage's accountant-channel positioning in the US/UK and tightens the gap with peer-AI assistants.

competitors.headline: Xero rolls out AI-powered data capture & extraction for UK customers ahead of MTD for Income Tax
competitors.summary: Xero's February 2026 product update introduced AI-powered data capture and extraction for UK customers, positioning the platform ahead of MTD ITSA. Direct compete-pressure on QBO UK's MTD product narrative.

competitors.headline: Avalara launches 1099 and W-9 APIs for embedded compliance
competitors.summary: Avalara opened APIs for its 1099/W-9 solutions — companies can now embed compliance workflows into ERPs, accounting platforms, e-commerce and marketplaces. Continues the agentic-tax push that Vertex is now restructuring around.
